name: Peak Design Travel Backpack 30L
description: The sage green Travel Backpack 30L from Peak Design is the core of a versatile transportation system for photographers, multimedia creators, and dedicated travelers.

features.Key Features:: Expansion/Compression Zippers | Designed for Internal Compartment System | Stowable Shoulder & Sternum Straps | Expandable Side Pockets | 15" Laptop and Tablet Pockets | Soft-Lined Top Pocket for Essentials | Low-Profile Top & Side Handles | 100% Recycled 400D Nylon | Waterproof 900D Nylon Bottom
